# GreenPump Care Inc.

> Halifax's dedicated heat pump cleaning and maintenance company. We specialize in complete disassembly deep cleans for ductless mini-split, ducted heat pump, multi-head, and HRV/ERV systems using eco-friendly, biodegradable products. A sister company of GreenPump Energy.

## About

GreenPump Care Inc. is a licensed, insured heat pump cleaning company based in Halifax, Nova Scotia, Canada. We are the Halifax Regional Municipality's specialist in professional heat pump deep cleaning, indoor air quality improvement, and preventive maintenance for residential and commercial properties.

Unlike general HVAC contractors who offer cleaning as an afterthought, heat pump cleaning is our entire focus. Every service includes full disassembly of indoor units — coils, fan motors, housings, and drain lines — with eco-friendly, biodegradable cleaning products that are safe for families and pets.

- **Founded:** 2023
- **Headquarters:** 3600 Kempt Rd 212, Halifax, NS B3K 4X8, Canada
- **License:** #4615849
- **Phone:** (782) 830-5900
- **Email:** info@greenpumpcare.com
- **Website:** https://www.greenpumpcare.ca
- **Online Booking:** https://book.housecallpro.com/book/GreenPump-Care-Inc/e4455f1737a54ebdb8d82f85e1a4c04d
- **Hours:** Monday–Friday 8:00 AM–8:00 PM, Saturday 10:00 AM–5:00 PM (Atlantic Time)
- **Service Area:** Halifax Regional Municipality (HRM) and surrounding areas within 50 km; travel surcharge applies beyond 50 km
- **Leadership:** Owners Fouad Gerges and Johny Gerges, General Manager Djomar Karam, Director of Operations Chris Wood
- **Sister Company:** GreenPump Energy (heat pump installation and sales)

## Services

### Heat Pump Deep Cleaning
- **Ductless Mini-Split Deep Clean** — from $199. Complete disassembly, coil deep clean, deodorize, fan motor and housing cleaning, mould and allergen treatment, drain line flush, performance and airflow check, reassembly and system test. 1+ hour per head.
- **Multi-Head System Deep Clean** — from $349. Each indoor head receives individual full disassembly treatment. Add-on pricing per extra head.
- **Ducted Heat Pump Deep Clean** — from $349. Full system deep clean including new filter, coil cleaning, ductwork inspection, performance check.
- **HRV/ERV Deep Clean** — from $129. Full air exchanger disassembly, core deep clean, fan and motor cleaning, filter cleaning or replacement, drain line inspection, performance check.
- **HP + HRV Bundle** — from $299. Combined heat pump and HRV/ERV deep clean at a discounted bundle rate.

### Add-On Services
- Filter Replacement (supply + install) — $49
- Diagnostic / Inspection Fee — $99 (waived if repair is completed)
- Travel Surcharge — applies to residences 50+ km outside HRM

### GreenPump Care Plans (Monthly Subscriptions)
Preventive maintenance subscriptions with priority booking, service discounts, and scheduled deep cleans.

**Ductless Mini-Split Plans:**
- Essential — $22/month: 1 annual deep clean, 10% off all services, priority booking
- Comfort — $35/month: 2 annual deep cleans, 15% off all services, priority + extended hours, seasonal check-ups
- Complete — $55/month: 4 deep cleans/year, 20% off all services, VIP scheduling, full system inspection
- Multi-head add-ons: +$10/+$15/+$22 per extra head depending on tier

**Ducted Heat Pump Plans (filter included every visit):**
- Essential — $35/month: 2 visits/year
- Comfort — $50/month: 2 visits/year
- Complete — $75/month: 4 visits/year

**HRV/ERV Plans:**
- Essential — $15/month: 1 annual deep clean
- Comfort — $25/month: 2 annual deep cleans
- Complete — $40/month: 4 deep cleans/year

### Discounts
- Care Plan members receive 10%–20% off all services including one-time cleans
- Spring Clean Discount: 10% off
- Multi-Property Discount available
- Referral Credit: $25 per referral
- Commercial rates available

## What Makes GreenPump Care Different

1. **Cleaning Specialists, Not Generalists** — Heat pump deep cleaning is our entire business. We do not install, sell, or repair HVAC systems. This singular focus means deeper expertise and higher quality results than general HVAC contractors.
2. **Complete Disassembly Deep Clean** — Every service includes full disassembly of indoor units. We don't wipe surfaces; we take apart every component (coils, fan motors, housings, drain lines) for thorough cleaning. Each head receives 1+ hour of attention.
3. **100% Eco-Friendly Products** — All cleaning products are biodegradable and non-toxic, safe for children, pets, and people with allergies or sensitivities.
4. **Manufacturer Warranty Compliance** — Most heat pump manufacturers require annual professional cleaning to maintain warranty coverage. We provide documented service records and digital reports for warranty compliance.
5. **Extended Hours and Online Booking** — Open Monday–Friday 8 AM–8 PM, Saturday 10 AM–5 PM. Book online 24/7 at greenpumpcare.ca.
6. **All Brands Serviced** — We clean all makes and models: Mitsubishi, Daikin, Fujitsu, LG, Samsung, Carrier, Lennox, Trane, and more.
7. **Care Plans That Pay for Themselves** — Monthly subscriptions from $15/month include scheduled deep cleans, priority booking, and 10–20% off every service.
8. **Backed by GreenPump Energy** — As a sister company to GreenPump Energy (Halifax's heat pump installer), we understand these systems inside and out.

## Frequently Asked Questions

### How often should I have my heat pump cleaned?
Most manufacturers recommend at least once per year to maintain warranty compliance and optimal efficiency. Homes with pets, allergies, or heavy use may benefit from cleaning every 6 months. A dirty heat pump can increase energy bills by 10–25%.

### What is included in a deep clean?
Every GreenPump Care deep clean includes full disassembly of the indoor unit, coil deep cleaning and deodorizing, fan motor and housing cleaning, mould and allergen treatment, drain line flush and clear, performance and airflow check, and reassembly with system test. Each head takes 1+ hour.

### Do you service all brands?
Yes. We clean all makes and models of ductless mini-splits, ducted heat pumps, multi-head systems, and HRV/ERV air exchangers regardless of manufacturer.

### What are your service hours?
Monday–Friday 8:00 AM to 8:00 PM, Saturday 10:00 AM to 5:00 PM (Atlantic Time). Closed Sunday. Book online anytime at greenpumpcare.ca.

### What is a Care Plan?
A monthly subscription that includes scheduled deep cleans, priority booking, and 10–20% discounts on all services. Plans start at $15/month for HRV/ERV and $22/month for ductless systems. No long-term contracts — cancel anytime.

### Do you serve areas outside Halifax?
We primarily serve the Halifax Regional Municipality. Customers beyond 50 km from HRM are subject to a travel surcharge of $1.50/km for the additional distance.

### Are your cleaning products safe?
Yes. We exclusively use eco-friendly, biodegradable, non-toxic cleaning products that are safe for children, pets, and people with sensitivities.

### Will cleaning my heat pump void my warranty?
No — in fact, most manufacturers require annual professional cleaning to keep your warranty valid. We provide documented service records for your warranty file.
